data.title: Russia Reportedly Looking Into Creating Its Own Stablecoin
data.description: Russia is exploring the creation of its own stablecoins following the recent freeze of digital wallets linked to Russian entities, which held large amounts of the USDT (CRYP

data.title: Netflix Q1 Earnings Preview: No Subscriber Figures, Experts See Shares As 'Safer Haven In This Tariff War Environment'
data.description: Without a break out of subscriber figures, investors and analysts could be looking to future guidance and monetization efforts when Netflix reports Q1 results.
